etymology.description: Depicts a footprint pointing downward; variant of 夂(夂) (zhǐ, "to go")
etymology.interpretation: The character 夊(suī, "downward foot") visually represents a downward-facing foot, suggesting movement or trajectory in a downward direction.

examples.chinese: 他的步伐缓慢(他的步伐緩慢)，就像夊一般(就像夊一般)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de bùfá huǎnmàn, jiù xiàng suī yībān.
examples.english: His steps are slow, like the character 夊.

examples.chinese: 我们观察到古代文字中(我們觀察到古代文字中)，常常使用夊来表达脚的动作(常常使用夊來表達腳的動作)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen guānchá dào gǔdài wénzì zhōng, chángcháng shǐyòng suī lái biǎodá jiǎo de dòngzuò.
examples.english: We observed that in ancient texts, the character 夊 was often used to express the action of the foot.
